token_description: Community currency with native on-chain demurrage for kchng.org

data_model.asset_definition: 1 KCHNG = 30 minutes verified care/agriculture work = 1 community meal
data_model.note: U256 supports future decimal precision; current deployment uses whole units

roles.description: Contract administrator with mint and governance privileges
Work claim verifier with reputation-based scoring
Individual who performs verified work and earns tokens
Grace period activator for hardship cases

trusts.description: Community organizations that set local demurrage parameters

annual_rate_bps.description: Annual demurrage rate in basis points (5-15%)

reputation_system.note: Context-specific reputation allows high trust as guest but low as host

balance.important: Balance includes demurrage calculation based on inactivity period
balance.warning: Not a stored balance - changes with time without transactions

transfer.function_signature: transfer(from: Address, to: Address, amount: U256)

total_supply.note: Total supply increases with work mints, decreases with demurrage burns

get_account.note: Use this to get raw stored balance before demurrage calculation

calculate_balance_with_demurrage.description: Internal function called by balance() and transfer()
calculate_balance_with_demurrage.note: Not directly callable; calculated on reads and transfers

register_trust.function_signature: register_trust(governor: Address, name: String, annual_rate_bps: u32, demurrage_period_days: u64)
register_trust.purpose: Create community organization with custom demurrage parameters

join_trust.purpose: Account joins trust to receive trust-specific demurrage rate

submit_work_claim.function_signature: submit_work_claim(worker: Address, work_type: WorkType, minutes_worked: u64, evidence_hash: Bytes, gps_lat: Option<i64>, gps_lon: Option<i64>) -> u64

activate_grace_period.function_signature: activate_grace_period(oracle: Address, account: Address, grace_type: GraceType, duration_days: u64)

demurrage_calculation.summary: Native on-chain demurrage applied to inactive accounts
demurrage_calculation.purpose: Encourage circulation - holding tokens loses value over time

trigger_conditions.applies_to: all token holders regardless of trust membership

calculation_algorithm.note: Uses integer division - no rounding, truncates toward zero

example_calculation.scenario: Account with 10,000 KCHNG, inactive for 60 days, 12% annual rate

trust_specific_rates.description: Trusts can set custom demurrage within protocol bounds

work_verification.summary: Time-based token issuance through verified work claims

cross_trust_exchange.description: Transfer between trusts with rate-adjusted calculation
cross_trust_exchange.example: Trust A (12%) → Trust B (8%) = 0.957 conversion factor
cross_trust_exchange.effect: Moves account membership to destination trust

legal_and_governance.note: Regulatory framework mapping not yet completed
legal_and_governance.recommendation: Legal review required before mainnet deployment

critical_behaviors: balance() returns TIME-DEPENDENT value, not stored balance
Demurrage is calculated on every balance() call and transfer()
Inactive accounts lose tokens even without transactions
Grace periods pause demurrage but don't reset last_activity
Trust membership affects demurrage rate applied
integration_recommendations: Cache balance calculations to avoid redundant RPC calls
Display demurrage countdown UI based on last_activity
Warn users before grace period expires
For wrappers: use get_account() for raw data, calculate demurrage off-chain
Monitor trust membership changes affecting demurrage rates

wrapper_implementation.option_1_read_only: Use get_account() to fetch last_activity, calculate demurrage client-side
wrapper_implementation.option_2_standard_interface: Create wrapper contract with stored balance, sync periodically
wrapper_implementation.option_3_bridge_adapter: Bridge handles KCHNG quirks at integration layer

testing_considerations: Test demurrage calculation matches on-chain results
Test trust rate changes affect existing accounts
Time capsule test: verify 1% loss after 30 days inactive

features: Fixed demurrage calculation (integer division bug resolved)
